subject: current-affairs
description: Gaza Peace Plan 2025 MCQs for PPSC, FPSC, NTS, CSS & PMS.

mcqs.q: The Gaza war 2023 began on:
mcqs.explanation: The Gaza war began on 7 October 2023 with Hamas's Operation Al-Aqsa Flood and Israel's response.

mcqs.q: The first day of which war was the deadliest in Israel's history, and the war was the deadliest for Palestinians in the broader conflict?
mcqs.explanation: 7 October 2023 — the first day of the Gaza war 2023 — was the deadliest day in Israel's history. The war is also the deadliest for Palestinians in the wider conflict.

mcqs.q: The first temporary ceasefire between Hamas and Israel broke down in:
mcqs.explanation: The first temporary ceasefire (a Qatari-brokered truce starting 24 November 2023) broke down in late November 2023.

mcqs.q: A second ceasefire took place on:
mcqs.explanation: The second Israel-Hamas ceasefire took effect on 19 January 2025.

mcqs.q: The second ceasefire ended with a surprise attack by Israel in:
mcqs.explanation: The second ceasefire collapsed in March 2025 when Israel resumed major operations in Gaza.

mcqs.q: Which war is Israel's longest-ever military conflict?
mcqs.explanation: The Gaza war 2023 has become Israel's longest-ever military conflict, surpassing earlier wars.

mcqs.q: The International Criminal Court (ICC) issued arrest warrants for:
mcqs.explanation: The ICC issued arrest warrants for Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu, former Defence Minister Yoav Gallant and Hamas commander Mohammed Deif.

mcqs.q: Who was withdrawn from the ICC arrest-warrant list after confirmation of his death?
mcqs.explanation: The ICC withdrew its arrest warrant against Hamas military commander Mohammed Deif after his death was officially confirmed.

mcqs.q: A third ceasefire came into effect on _____ after Israel and Hamas agreed to phase one of a US-backed peace plan.
mcqs.explanation: The third ceasefire — Phase 1 of Trump's 20-Point Plan — came into effect on 10 October 2025.

mcqs.q: During the Gaza war 2023, Israel received extensive military and diplomatic support from:
mcqs.explanation: The United States provided the bulk of military and diplomatic support to Israel during the Gaza war 2023.

mcqs.q: The Gaza Peace Plan 2025 was drafted on:
mcqs.explanation: The Gaza Peace Plan 2025 was drafted and announced on 29 September 2025.

mcqs.q: The Gaza Peace Plan 2025 was signed on:
mcqs.explanation: The Gaza Peace Plan was signed at the Sharm el-Sheikh peace summit on 9 October 2025.

mcqs.q: The Gaza Peace Plan 2025 was effective from:
mcqs.explanation: The Gaza Peace Plan 2025 came into effect on 10 October 2025.

mcqs.q: Who were the mediators of the Gaza Peace Plan 2025?
mcqs.explanation: The four mediators were the United States, Qatar, Egypt and Turkey — all of these.

mcqs.q: Who announced the Gaza Peace Plan 2025?
mcqs.explanation: The Gaza Peace Plan 2025 was announced by US President Donald Trump on 29 September 2025.

mcqs.q: The Gaza Peace Plan 2025 is commonly referred to in news reports as Trump's:
mcqs.explanation: The plan is popularly known as Trump's 20-Point Plan.

mcqs.q: On 29 September 2025, Trump gave Hamas a deadline to accept the proposal by _____ or face 'all hell'.
mcqs.explanation: Trump's deadline to Hamas was 5 October 2025.

mcqs.q: On _____, Hamas agreed to release any remaining hostages and hand over Gaza's administration to a Palestinian body of independent technocrats — though it did not agree to disarm.
mcqs.explanation: Hamas issued its partial acceptance of the plan on 3 October 2025.

mcqs.q: The Gaza war 2023 is also known by the Hebrew name:
mcqs.explanation: Israel officially calls the war the 'Iron Swords War' (Operation Iron Swords).

mcqs.q: Hamas refers to its 7 October 2023 attack as the:
mcqs.explanation: Hamas calls its 7 October 2023 attack 'Operation Al-Aqsa Flood'.

mcqs.q: Trump unveiled the Gaza Peace Plan 2025 alongside which Israeli leader at the White House?
mcqs.explanation: Trump announced the plan flanked by Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu at the White House on 29 September 2025.

mcqs.q: The 9 October 2025 Gaza Peace Plan summit was hosted by which Egyptian leader?
mcqs.explanation: The Sharm el-Sheikh peace summit was hosted by Egyptian President Abdel Fattah el-Sisi.

mcqs.q: In Phase 1 of Trump's 20-Point Plan, how many Palestinian prisoners were to be released in exchange for the living hostages?
mcqs.explanation: Phase 1 provided for the release of 2,000 Palestinian prisoners in exchange for the living hostages.

mcqs.q: Of the 2,000 Palestinian prisoners released, how many were serving life sentences?
mcqs.explanation: 250 of the 2,000 released Palestinian prisoners were serving life sentences.

mcqs.q: Phase 1 of the plan required the hostage-prisoner exchange to be completed within how many hours?
mcqs.explanation: Phase 1 required the exchange to be completed within 72 hours of the ceasefire taking effect.

mcqs.q: Under the plan, Israeli forces were required to withdraw to:
options: Pre-designated lines inside the Gaza Strip
mcqs.explanation: The plan required Israel's military to withdraw to pre-designated lines inside the Gaza Strip — not a full withdrawal.

mcqs.q: Hamas's chief negotiator during the Gaza Peace Plan 2025 talks was:
mcqs.explanation: Khalil al-Hayya led the Hamas negotiating team in 2025 (Sinwar and Haniyeh had been killed in 2024).

mcqs.q: Hamas's October 2025 response specifically did NOT agree to:
mcqs.explanation: Hamas's 3 October 2025 response did not agree to disarm or to forgo political influence in Gaza.

mcqs.q: Trump's 20-Point Plan envisages an interim governing body for Gaza known as the:
mcqs.explanation: Trump's 20-Point Plan proposed an interim governance arrangement called the 'Board of Peace' to oversee Gaza.

mcqs.q: Among the four mediators of the Gaza Peace Plan 2025, which was the host country of the formal signing summit?
mcqs.explanation: Egypt hosted the signing summit at Sharm el-Sheikh on 9 October 2025.

mcqs.q: The collapse of the second ceasefire (March 2025) was followed by a renewed Israeli offensive that continued until the:
mcqs.explanation: After the March 2025 collapse, fighting continued until the third ceasefire — based on Trump's 20-Point Plan — took effect on 10 October 2025.
